case_title: TANG, LAI KUEN VS. HON'S WUN-TUN HOUSE (CALIFORNIA) LTD

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANG, LAI KUEN AS TO DEFENDANT HON'S WUN-TUN HOUSE (CALIFORNIA) LTD A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
